nasb.text: ‘Heaven is My throne, And earth is the footstool of My feet; What kind of house will you build for Me?’ says the Lord, ‘Or what place is there for My repose?

esv.text: “‘Heaven is my throne, and the earth is my footstool. What kind of house will you build for me, says the Lord, or what is the place of my rest?

cnv.text: ‘主說：天是我的寶座， 地是我的腳凳， 你們要為我建造怎樣的殿呢？ 哪裡是我安息的地方呢？

ccb.text: ‘天是我的宝座，地是我的脚凳，你们要为我造怎样的殿宇？哪里可作我的安歇之处？

csbs.text: ‘主说：“天是我的宝座， 地是我的脚凳。 你们要为我建造什么样的殿宇    呢？ 我安息的地方在哪里呢？
